subcodes.first_line: Blessed is He Who hath manifested Himself unto all that are in the heavens and on earth, and Who summoneth all unto God, the Almighty [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: تبارک الذی اظهر نفسه لمن فی السموات و الارضین و یدع الکل الی الله المقتدر
subcodes.subjects: @steadfastness; perseverance; faithfulness, @power and sovereignty of God; omnipotence of God
